segments.text: Yeah, yeah,
uh,
uh,
yeah,
uh
Beat drop, shoes tied, hood up, door slammed
Still half-tied, but I move like a grown man
No speech, no height, no coach in my ear
Just that old weak voice that I came here to kill
I don't feel ready, that's the point of it
Same cold walk, same joints feelin' stiff
Gym lights buzzin', bag on the floor
I'm not in the mood, so I need it more
First set ugly, second set clean
Third set lookin' like I might get mean
Hands on the bar, quick sharp white
I don't trust motivation, I trust what I write
Logbook open, numbers in ink
Either add one rep or adjust how I think
I'm not here flexin', I'm not here cute
I came to tell myself to stop, shut up and move
I keep pushin' to the arms, lock up to the lungs
Burns high in the heartbeat, jump to the sweat
Drip down in the vision blurb
I don't care how bad that pressure hurt
Another day, another day, another day
Another set, another bait, another war
Another voice in my head I ignore
If I came this far, I ain't slowin' down
I don't stop, I don't quit right now
Yo, bitch feel heavy, good, let it be
That's the same way you standin' between me and me
Two plates talkin' like, you sure you him?
I unrack slow with a shark fin grin
Elbows tucked, chest tight, breath held
World get quiet when the barbell fell
Touch and press, no panic, no bounce
That's one more reason I don't count myself out
Squats on deck, legs already mad
But I don't negotiate with habits I had
Deep breath, brace, spine locked in
Ain't in the hole, but I drive through it
Deadlift, they got truth in steel
You can't fake heart when the nerlin' feel real
Boy, I don't care what excuse you brought
It only moves when your whole soul talks
I keep pushin' to the arms, lock up to the lungs
Burns high in the heartbeat, jump to the sweat
Drip down in the vision blurb
I don't care how bad that pressure hurt
Another set,
another day,
another day,
another night
Another blade, another war
Another voice in my head I ignore
If I came this far, ain't slowing down
I don't stop, I don't quit right now
Way in the shaker, meals in the bag
Mack Roseborn, but the mirror don't cap
Pacing late night, water all day
Stretch when I'm stiff so I don't break
Skull crushes burn, planks make me shake
Crutches got fire running under my waist
Push-ups after just to prove I'm sick
Not sick like ill, sick like discipline
This ain't about abs, this ain't about arms
This about keeping one promise through storms
This about becoming the proof I need
When my own damn mind start testing me
No perfect week, no perfect mood
You see,
perfect days where I still follow through
I don't need applause, I don't need a crutch
I need one more rep when I wanna sit down
I keep pushing till the arms lock up
Till the lungs burn dry and the heart beat jump
Till the sweat drip down in the vision book
I don't care how bad that pressure
Another set, another beat, another war
Another voice in my head I ignore
If I came this far, I ain't slowing down
I don't stop, I quit right now
I picture summer, but I don't daydream
I put that beach body under a machine
I put that cocktail far down the road
I put the day's work where excuses go
Money right, mind right, body getting shot
Cold on the screen after reps in the dark
Not trying to be perfect, trying to be dangerous
Trying to walk it, trying to walk it
Like pressure makes sense
Some days I'm strong, some days I run
Some days just showing up wins it all
But skip too much and the old me grows
So I cut that off before it gets close
I know that voice, I know that trap
Take one day, then the hunger goes flat
Now, now today, now this round
I came inside, believe with the crown
I keep pushing till the arms lock up
Till the lungs burn dry and the heart beat jump
Till the sweat drip down in the vision book
I don't care how bad that pressure hurt
Another set, another beat, another war
Another voice in my head I ignore
If I came this far, I'd slow it down
I don't stop, I don't quit right now
No speech, no excuses
One more rap, then another, then another
Then another, then another
